name: Banana Cake Pop
description: Banana Cake Pop — ChilliCream's GraphQL IDE for exploring, testing, and monitoring Hot Chocolate GraphQL APIs.

seo.title: Banana Cake Pop — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Banana Cake Pop: Banana Cake Pop — ChilliCream's GraphQL IDE for exploring, testing, and monitoring Hot Chocolate GraphQL APIs.

when_to_use: GraphQL API exploration with schema visualization
Test Hot Chocolate mutations in interactive IDE
Monitor GraphQL query performance and error rates
Team collaboration on shared GraphQL workspaces
Debug N+1 query issues in Hot Chocolate APIs

pros: Best-in-class GraphQL IDE for Hot Chocolate
cons: Most polished experience favors Hot Chocolate
Monitoring features gated behind paid tier
review.verdict: If you live in Hot Chocolate, Banana Cake Pop beats GraphiQL—outside .NET it's just another option.
review.best_for: .NET teams building GraphQL APIs with ChilliCream's Hot Chocolate stack
review.not_for: Teams using Apollo or non-.NET GraphQL servers where community tools are stronger
